title: 勝ちたくて、勝ちたいから！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Satsuki Sho behind us, we have been
devoting all our energies into training for the
Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For Winning Ticket, no race could be more
important—it's the moment she's always dreamed
of.
choice_data_list: (I have to make sure she wins this one!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Though that thought stands firm in my mind...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: WHOA!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer, it's just you...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, sorry! I had a weird dream, so I was zoning
out...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's nothing! Just a dream!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Okay, time to get warmed up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ever since the Satsuki Sho, Winning Ticket has
been behaving a little oddly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Worried, I look over to her, only to see...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Wh-whooaa!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bam!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During a simple jog, she stumbles over her own
legs and falls.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oh, haha! Oopsie, that kinda shocked me!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Sorry. But don't worry, I didn't get hurt, so it's
fine!
choice_data_list:
Should we leave training at that for today, just
to be safe?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: N-no way!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I mean... you know? The Japanese Derby is so
soon!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
If I wanna give it my best shot, I have to practice
a lot!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Back to running!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I can warn her not to overdo it, she's
already gone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even as the days go on, Ticket seems strangely
restless during our training sessions...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff! Phew...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: So? My time! What's my time? How did I do?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And my watch shows... it's far slower than her
best.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... Not good! This won't do! It's not good
enough!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: All right! One more time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ticket clearly still wants to carry on, but it's
already gotten quite late, so...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'm fine! I can still run!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That uncharacteristic stumble the other day... The
overreactions to every little slip in her lap times...
There's definitely something off with her lately.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Being a trainer is about more than just assisting
your student with her training.
choice_data_list: Why don't we have a chat?
Why don't we have a chat?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huh? A chat?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Urghhh... Do we really have the time for a
leisurely stroll like this?
choice_data_list: What's going on with you lately?
What's going on with you lately?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huh? With me?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: ...I-impatient?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: For real? Is that how I seem? But I... I...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
So, um... listen. I've been having these dreams
lately.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Just, you know...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Dreams of... losing the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
It's the same every time. Taishin and Hayahide
dash ahead, and I'm left behind...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
No matter how fast I run, I can't catch up, and I
end up dead last.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Most horrible of all, my fans are so disappointed!
They're all like, "That was the worst Derby ever!"

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Now I'm... I'm scared of running in the Derby!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
And Taishin and Hayahide aren't afraid at all. It's
just me who's being a dummy! But I'm really
scared.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I shouldn't... I shouldn't be this afraid! It's not like
I had any chance of winning in the first place!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: What should I doooo? Waaaagh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She panicked and fell because she was scared. It
was fear that made her want to shorten her time
by any means.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But a racer who's okay with losing has no reason
to be afraid to race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she's scared, that just proves how much she
cares about winning. In short...
choice_data_list: You want to win this more than anyone else.
You want to win this more than anyone else.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list:
Hold onto that feeling. It's going to be your
strength when you race.

Hold onto that feeling. It's going to be your
strength when you race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When things are really rough, the drive to win can
become a powerful motivator.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That's why...
choice_data_list: The fear that you feel isn't weakness.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: It's not?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After some quiet contemplation...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Winning Ticket jumps up.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I get it! You're right! It's my secret weapon!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
This is amazing! I feel super refreshed all of a
sudden! I could go run a bunch of laps right now!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I feel like I can actually win! This feeling—

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: No, that's not right. It's not just a feeling. I'm going to win. I'm gonna win the Derby—I know it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Winning Ticket takes a deep breath.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I will win... the DEEERRBYYYYY!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yelling at the moon, Ticket looks like her bright,
shining self again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her face is glowing with fighting spirit from deep
within, and it's a dazzling sight to see. She's as
stunning as the stars in the night sky.
